summary: The diff implements all three requirements: REQ-1 (backend dollar bank account model and methods), REQ-2 (WithdrawalPage at /withdrawal), and REQ-3 (sidebar and bottom nav Withdraw links). The implementation appears largely complete with minor uncertainty around backend method names due to truncation.

hallucinated_features.description: Multi-language translations for the 'Withdraw' label in BottomNav (es, fr, de, ar, hi, ja) beyond the core English label
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request only asked for a 'Withdraw' label with wallet/cash icon; it did not request i18n/localization of this label across multiple languages. The BottomNav and Layout.tsx add localized variants for all supported languages.

hallucinated_features.description: backend/migration.mo module providing a data migration path from the old actor state to the new actor state with creatorBankBalance and withdrawalRequests fields
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request specified backend logic in main.mo but did not request a separate migration module. A migration.mo file was added as a new file.
